hooks.command: cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && python -m pytest engines/*/tests/ shared/*/tests/ -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -5; test ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -eq 0 || (echo 'ERROR: Tests must pass before committing. Run tests and fix failures first.' && exit 2)
cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && python -m pytest engines/*/tests/ shared/*/tests/ -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -5; test ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -eq 0 || (echo 'ERROR: Tests must pass before pushing.' && exit 2)

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty' | { read file_path; if echo "$file_path" | grep -q 'engines/.*/src/'; then engine=$(echo "$file_path" | sed 's|.*/engines/\([^/]*\)/.*|\1|'); echo "REMINDER: You modified engine code in $engine. If behavior changed, update engines/$engine/SPEC.md. If state changed, update engines/$engine/CLAUDE.md."; fi; }
